1.1 Dot Product

Definition 1.1.1.

For vectors and , their dot product is defined by The dot product is a scalar.

Theorem 1.1.2.

For a fixed vector , .

Theorem 1.1.3.

For two given vectors of the same dimension, and ,

Corollary 1.1.3.1.

For two given vectors and , is orthogonal to iff
